info.name: Trulioo Platform API
info.description:
Workflow Studio API (Trulioo Platform). Drive hosted and embedded workflows: initialize a flow, submit data and files for each step, handle handoffs between user-facing capture and backend processing, and retrieve end-client profiles, files, workflow definitions, and transaction state. Backs both the Low-Code Workflow Studio and the API-first Workflow Studio integrations.


Contact Support:
 Name: Trulioo Support
 Email: support@trulioo.com
